ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specializations" (
  "specialization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialization */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program that this specialization belongs to */,
  "specialization_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each specialization */,
  "specialization_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialization */,
  "specialization_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the specialization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specializations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_courses" (
  "program_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program-course pair */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program that this course belongs to */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specialization_courses" (
  "specialization_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialization-course pair */,
  "specialization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specialization that this course belongs to */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialization_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specialization_courses_specialization_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialization_id") REFERENCES specializations ("specialization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specialization_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code for the course (e.g., ACCT*1220) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., online, in-person, blended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_attributes" (
  "attr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course attribute */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "lecture_hours" REAL /* Number of lecture hours */,
  "lab_hours" REAL /* Number of lab hours */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the course */,
  "grading_scale" TEXT /* Grading scale used for the course */,
  "grading_basis" TEXT /* Basis for grading the course (e.g., letter grade, pass/fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_attributes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "preq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "prerequisite" TEXT /* Prerequisite course code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corequisites" (
  "coreq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "corequisite" TEXT /* Corequisite course code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coreq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restrictions" (
  "rest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restriction */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "restriction" TEXT /* Restriction description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restrictions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equivalencies" (
  "equiv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equivalent course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "equivalent" TEXT /* Equivalent course code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equiv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equivalencies_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_course_codes" (
  "ext_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external course code */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "external_code" TEXT /* External course code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ext_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_course_codes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "sched_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester (e.g., Fall, Winter) */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the course */,
  "section" INTEGER /* Section number of the course */,
  "room" TEXT /* Location of the course (e.g., Room 101, Room 202) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sched_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the enrollment (e.g., Fall, Winter) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date that the student enrolled in the course */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date that the student withdrew from the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Program that the student is enrolled in */,
  "specialization_id" INTEGER /* Specialization that the student is enrolled in */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_specialization_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialization_id") REFERENCES specializations ("specialization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_inst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-instructor pair */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_inst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role that this permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the student */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message written by the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_messages_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_messages_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notif_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "notification" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notif_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "average_grade" REAL /* Average grade of students in the course */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate of the course */,
  "pass_rate" REAL /* Pass rate of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
